summary: Iteration 149 - Frontend testing for Net Worth tab calculations, Adviser sidebar structure changes, and Client Profile tab. All 10 features verified successfully.

issues: Retirement Readiness shows 0% when API fails - graceful degradation works but shows 'At Risk' badge which may confuse users

critical_code_review_comments: Net Worth tab calculations are correct and consistent: Net Worth $1,608,800, Gross Assets $2,278,000, Liabilities $669,200
Full Calculation Breakdown table shows all 12 assets + 3 liabilities with correct totals
Assets by Category table correctly sums to $2,278,000
Assets by Entity breakdown correctly shows Super ($443,000), Personal ($1,156,000), Joint ($679,000)
Adviser sidebar correctly removed: Client Health Dashboard, AI & Tasks, Compliance sections
Adviser sidebar correctly contains: Dashboard, CRM, Execution, Integrations, Tools
Meeting Prep is correctly under Execution section
Security is correctly under Tools section
Client Profile tab shows high-level overview with all required sections
Numbers are consistent across Overview tab, Net Worth tab, and Client Profile tab
seed_data_creation: None - used existing thompson_family client data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 10 features verified. Net Worth calculations use local mockAssets/mockLiabilities for consistency. To test Adviser sidebar: set localStorage app_mode='adviser', clear selected_client, navigate to /advisor-command-center. To test Client Profile: set localStorage app_mode='adviser' and selected_client=JSON with id 'thompson_family', navigate to /dashboard, click Profile tab (last tab). Compliance modal appears on first visit - dismiss by clicking 'I Understand'.
